name: pi-questions
description: Pi extension for structured multi-tab popup questions and bridge-driven replies.

settings.label: Enable questions
settings.description: Register the question tool, /question-demo, popup UI, and bridge question service.

settings.label: Popup width
settings.description: Preferred question popup width in terminal columns.

settings.label: Popup max height
settings.description: Maximum overlay height, number or percentage string.

settings.label: Visible option rows
settings.description: Number of option rows shown before scrolling.

settings.label: Default popup header
settings.description: Fallback title when a question request has no header.

settings.label: Bridge replies enabled
settings.description: Allow pi-session-bridge to answer/reject pending questions.
